create(initializer, middlewares?).description: Create a new store with initial state and optional middleware

store.getState().description: Get the current state snapshot (includes computed properties)

store.setState(update).description: Merge partial state into current state (batched via microtask)

store.setState(updater).description: Update state using an updater function for safe reads

store.on(event, listener).description: Subscribe to all state changes or initialization

store.on(event, path, listener).description: Subscribe to changes on a specific state path

store.reset().description: Reset state to the initial value from the initializer function

store.compute(name, fn, deps).type: (name: string, fn: (state: T) => R, deps: string[]) => void
store.compute(name, fn, deps).description: Register a computed property with dependency tracking

createHook(store).description: Create a React hook bound to a store for reactive component integration

useStore(selector?, equalityFn?).description: React hook returned by createHook. Optional selector for derived slices

createSlice(name, initializer, middlewar.type: (name: string, initializer: () => T, middlewares?: Middleware<T>[]) => Slice<T>
createSlice(name, initializer, middlewar.description: Create a named slice. Usable directly as a Store<T> in standalone mode, or adopted by combineSlices() for composition

combineSlices(slices, middlewares?).description: Compose multiple slices into a single store. Bidirectional sync: slice writes notify the combined store, combined writes notify the relevant slice's subscribers

slice.sliceName.description: The name passed to createSlice. Used as the key in combined state

slice.getState() / setState() / on() / r.description: Slices implement the full Store<T> interface — works identically standalone or after being combined

combinedStore.slices.description: The slices passed to combineSlices, exposed for direct slice access

persistMiddleware(options).description: Persist state. Options: storage ('local' | 'session' | Storage | AsyncStorageAdapter), key, include/exclude paths, version + migrate, debounceMs, custom serialize/deserialize, onError

undoRedoMiddleware(options).description: Undo/redo history. Options: maxHistorySize, paths (scoped undo), coalesceMs (group rapid edits), maxBytes (memory cap). Returned store gets undo, redo, beginGroup, endGroup, clearHistory, canUndo, canRedo

optimisticMiddleware(options).description: Apply state changes locally, run an async commit, and roll back automatically on rejection. Returned store gets optimistic(setStateLike), isPending(), pendingCount()

syncMiddleware(options).description: Sync state across instances via a pluggable transport (BroadcastChannel, storage event, WebSocket, custom). Conflict resolve modes: 'remote-wins' | 'local-wins' | 'merge' | custom resolver

broadcastChannelTransport / storageEvent.description: Built-in transports for syncMiddleware. Implement SyncTransport ({ send, onReceive, close? }) to add your own

validationMiddleware(options).description: Reject or warn on invalid state. Options accept either a function validator, a Zod/Valibot-style schema (parse / safeParse), and/or an asyncValidator for server-side checks. behavior: 'reject' | 'warn'

throttleMiddleware / debounceMiddleware.description: Rate-limit setState calls. Throttle fires on leading + trailing edges; debounce only after activity stops

loggerMiddleware(predicate?).description: Console-log init and change events. Optional predicate filters which changes are logged

devToolsMiddleware.description: Send state changes to window.__FLUXO_DEVTOOLS__ if present

Authoring middleware.description: A middleware is just a function. Common patterns: wrap setState (throttle, debounce), subscribe via store.on() (logger, persist), augment the returned store with new methods (undoRedo). Order in create(init, [a, b, c]) is left-to-right wrapping
